reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio de primera.Buena accesibilidad y salida.  Sólo naftas, el bar es amplio...lo malo es que si te sientas adentro, seguro que salís con olor a comida.

(Translated by Google)
First-class gas station. Good access and exit. Only gasoline, the bar is spacious...the downside is that if you sit inside, you'll definitely leave smelling like food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2561952699267032562/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNJei15OWRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy amable la atención de los playeros pero muchas veces no tienen nafta super, solo tienen infinia y nunca funciona la maquina para inflar las cubiertas

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants were very friendly, but they often don't have premium gasoline, only regular, and the tire inflator never works.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
